original: Anno leaps out of the way as the goo-girl lunges for her! “Bitch!” the goo shouts. “I’m not almost human! I’M MORE HUMAN THAN YOU ARE.”

The gray goo’s hand lashes out, grabbing Anno by the neck and slamming your companion up against the bulkhead, choking her. Anno thrashes out, punching the goo square in the face... only for its face to deform around her fist, letting it pass straight through and hardening around it, trapping Anno’s hand. “Almost human, was it? I’LL SHOW YOU ALMOST HUMAN!”\n

"+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"You duck":"Anno ducks")+" back, evading the goo’s sword strike. Before she can swing again, "+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"you get":"Anno gets")+" a shot off, blasting the goo’s sword into pieces... only for it to reform a moment later, once "+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"you’re":"shes")+" safely away.
"+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"You duck":"Anno ducks")+" back just in time, turning what might have been a mortal blow into a stinging graze. She isn’t playing around!\n

Just as the tentacles are about to grab you, half of them explode in showers of goop as Anno levels her gun at them, firing dangerously close to your head. You duck as the others writhe and retreat under a hail of fire.
Two of the tentacles wrap tightly around your wrists
, while two more grab your [pc.legs], lifting you up from the ground!
, while the rest grapple your inhuman lower half, raising you up from the deck until your [pc.legs] are dangling!
, while the rest grab your [pc.legOrLegs], lifting you up from the ground!
Another tentacle emerges, squirming toward your mouth; others crawl across your body, seeking out your other hole
. Across the room, Anno is suffering the same fate, tendrils of gray wrapping around her limbs, tearing at her sheer catsuit to get at her pussy and tits.

"+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"You knock":"Anno knocks")+" her fist aside at the last moment, letting her momentum carry her through to the deck. Just when she tries to rise up, Anno leaps in with a roundhouse kick that takes the bitch’s head clean off! Of course, she reforms a moment later across the room, looking no worse for wear.

Her fist slams into "+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"you":"Anno")+" like a freighter, cracking into "+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"your":"her")+" face and sending "+("PlayerCharacter"===e.getClassName()?"you":"her")+" plummeting to the ground. Oh, fuck, that "+("Anno"===e.getClassName()?"looks like it ":"")+"hurt!
The blow hits you so hard you’re seeing stars!
Anno doesn’t look all that steady on her feet!

\n\nAs she does so, several mounds of gray goo arise from the deck, slowly forming into new goo-girls. Each is a near perfect clone of the first, though butt-naked and with greatly overstated busts, hips, and asses, all of which are almost cartoonishly big.
